title: Elaphoglossum scalpellum
taxonomy: Elaphoglossum scalpellum is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This family is part of the larger division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns. The genus Elaphoglossum is a large and diverse group of ferns, with over 1,000 species. Elaphoglossum scalpellum is native to South America and is often found growing in tropical and subtropical regions. Further classification of Elaphoglossum scalpellum may include its placement within a specific section or series within the genus.
uses: Elaphoglossum scalpellum is a species of fern that has been used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
